title: Harbour Housewares Wooden Long Handle Weed Brush - Patio & Driveway Weed Remover with Brass Bristles and Steel Scraper - 120cm Garden Path, Block Paving & Moss Cleaner
features: 🧹 Heavy-Duty Patio Weed Brush & Driveway Cleaner - Wooden garden weed removal tool ideal for clearing moss, grass and stubborn weeds from patios, block paving, paths and driveways
🔪 Steel Crack Scraper for Deep-Rooted Weeds - Integrated pointed metal scraper removes weeds from paving joints, brick gaps and expansion cracks for thorough ground maintenance
💪 Stiff Brass Wire Bristles for Moss & Debris - Durable brass bristles scrub block paving, stone slabs and patio joints, helping prevent regrowth and improve outdoor surface appearance
📐 Angled Head for Edges, Kerbs & Corners - Specially angled brush reaches tight edges and hard-to-access areas, perfect for detailed patio, pathway and driveway cleaning tasks
📏 116.5cm Long-Handle Garden Weeding Tool - Extended wooden handle reduces bending and strain; drag backwards during use to protect the head joint and maximise product lifespan
description: Product Description Harbour Housewares Long Handle Wooden Weed Brush Keep your garden patios, paths & driveways free from weeds & other unwanted plant growth with this Wooden Weed Brush from Harbour Housewares. A series of stiff brass wire bristles scrubs away seedlings & debris, helping to reduce the likelihood of weed regrowth. The angled shape lets you get right into the edges & corners of your patio to provide a pristine finish, while a pointed metal scraper helps to effortlessly carve out deep-rooted & stubborn weeds from cracks, gaps & crevices. PLEASE NOTE: To ensure best performance and maximum lifespan of the product, all weeding should be performed by dragging the brush backwards towards the user, as opposed to forwards and away. This will reduce unnecessary pressure on the join between the brush head and the handle.
